content.text: The choice of the supply scheme at startup is based on the latched status of HWCFG[2:1] pins before cold PORST release and is indicated by PMSWSTAT.HWCFGEVR status flags

items: Single source 5 V supply level (VEXT = 5 V) is supported in following topologies. – EVRC in SMPS mode with external switches and EVR33 in LDO mode with internal pass devices.
Single source 3.3 V supply level (VEXT = VDDP3 = 3.3 V) is supported in following topologies. – EVRC in SMPS mode with external switches and EVR33 is inactive.
